#ANALYSIS: J Anchor Days Baseline Evaluation

**Filed:** 2026-06-21
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** analysis
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We need to evaluate the current engine's performance on J anchor days to compute edge_capture, then validate with walk-forward and real-fills on top 3 J days. This establishes the baseline for assessing any candidate changes.

## Mechanism

Run Stage-1 backtest on J anchor days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04, 5/05, 5/06, 5/07) using the current engine logic (as defined in heartbeat.md and params.json). Compute engine P&L on each day, then edge_capture = sum(winners) - sum(max(0, loss_on_losers)). Then conduct walk-forward validation (OOS/IS Sharpe ratio >=0.7) and real-fills validation on top 3 J days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04) comparing BS-sim to realistic OPRA fills.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** J anchor days are 6 days (3 winners, 3 losers) selected by J's source-of-truth; overfit risk high if tuned to these days.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (walk-forward held-out window not yet performed)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (real-fills check on top 3 J days not yet performed)
5. **Failure modes:** worst day could be large loss on a loser day if engine takes the trade; max drawdown scenario; blow-up if engine increases size on losing days.
6. **Concentration:** if top-5 days = X% of P&L, state X -- unknown requires Stage-1 backtest.

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators must pass, walk-forward validation (OOS/IS Sharpe ratio >=0.7) must pass, real-fills validation on top 3 J days must show <20% diff from BS-sim.

## Confidence

0 / 10 -- no data yet; requires Stage-1 backtest.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not conflict with any candidate; it provides the baseline edge_capture needed to evaluate all candidates' impact on J days. It complements the leaderboard by establishing the source-of-truth benchmark.
